## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Beer;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Beer { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
alcohol, bar, beverage, brewery, drink

## Categories
food-beverage

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/beer)
